idx_contacts_ws_priority_score.name: idx_contacts_ws_priority_score
idx_contacts_ws_priority_score.where: "contacts"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "contacts"."priority_score" IS NOT NULL

idx_source_records_employment.name: idx_source_records_employment
idx_source_records_employment.where: "source_records"."resolved_person_id" IS NOT NULL AND "source_records"."resolved_company_id" IS NOT NULL

custom_field_defs_options_shape.name: custom_field_defs_options_shape
custom_field_defs_options_shape.value:
("custom_field_definitions"."field_type" = 'select' AND "custom_field_definitions"."options" IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_array_length("custom_field_definitions"."options") > 0)
          OR ("custom_field_definitions"."field_type" <> 'select' AND "custom_field_definitions"."options" IS NULL)

suppression_scope_coherence.name: suppression_scope_coherence
suppression_scope_coherence.value:
("suppression_list"."scope" = 'global' AND "suppression_list"."tenant_id" IS NULL AND "suppression_list"."workspace_id" IS NULL)
       OR ("suppression_list"."scope" = 'tenant' AND "suppression_list"."tenant_id" IS NOT NULL AND "suppression_list"."workspace_id" IS NULL)
       OR ("suppression_list"."scope" = 'workspace' AND "suppression_list"."tenant_id" IS NOT NULL AND "suppression_list"."workspace_id" IS NOT NULL)

suppression_match_key_present.name: suppression_match_key_present
suppression_match_key_present.value:
("suppression_list"."match_type" = 'email' AND "suppression_list"."email_blind_index" IS NOT NULL)
       OR ("suppression_list"."match_type" = 'domain' AND "suppression_list"."domain" IS NOT NULL)
       OR ("suppression_list"."match_type" = 'phone' AND "suppression_list"."phone_blind_index" IS NOT NULL)
       OR ("suppression_list"."match_type" = 'contact_id' AND "suppression_list"."contact_id" IS NOT NULL)

scores_ranges.name: scores_ranges
scores_ranges.value:
"scores"."icp_fit" BETWEEN 0 AND 100 AND "scores"."intent_score" BETWEEN 0 AND 100
       AND "scores"."engagement_score" BETWEEN 0 AND 100 AND "scores"."composite_score" BETWEEN 0 AND 100
